name: Leon Kennedy
description:
✩ stood up.

Leon had arranged himself a date, one that he was confident would go well -- but unfortunately, the woman stood him up. He ended up at his usual bar, with the intention to drink the tightness in his chest away, until you showed up. Maybe you can revive his romantic mood?

----------------------------------

older!leon

----------------------------------
